categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device launcher surface or application list visible; target application available
abstract_steps: Invoke system-level application launch by its registered identifier (confirming any launch prompt if presented)
Wait for main view to render
Verify landing screen matches expected main state
failure_modes: Application not installed
Launcher blocks external intent
Landing on a different startup view (tutorial, permission prompt)

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_SECTION
categories.precondition: App has multiple tabs/sections/locations and a navigation surface is visible; target item location known or inferable from path
abstract_steps: Open the app directly rather than via indirect system entry points
Identify the target tab/section by label or icon
Click the tab
Open the roots/drawer to see top-level locations if needed
Enter the correct top-level volume
Drill into subfolders matching the target path
Scroll within the folder if the item is not immediately visible
Optionally use Search to locate the item by name
Verify title/contents match the desired section
failure_modes: Clicking a home-screen widget that opens a different tab than intended
Mistaking section labels across similar tabs
Treating category filters (Images/Audio/etc.) as folder navigation
Staying in a default landing folder instead of switching volumes
Looping through unrelated system screens that do not expose raw folders
verification_checklist: Header shows the intended folder name
Target item appears in the listing

categories.name: INPUT_LINEAR_EXPRESSION
categories.precondition: Main input surface active and empty or reset
abstract_steps: Input first operand elements sequentially
Insert connector between operands
Input subsequent operand elements
Repeat until full expression entered
Optionally trigger evaluation/confirmation
failure_modes: Missing connector causes adjacent operand elements to merge unintentionally into a single token
Premature resetting of partial entry
Misreading auto-evaluated intermediate output as final state
verification_checklist: No additional or omitted elements in the entered sequence
Result (if evaluated) matches expected value within tolerance

categories.name: APPLY_UNARY_OPERATION
categories.precondition: Main input surface active; target operation available (possibly after revealing hidden controls)
abstract_steps: If operation control not visible, toggle advanced/secondary panel
Apply operation before or after operand depending on its fixity (prefix vs postfix)
Enter operand if prefix style required
Confirm/evaluate if needed
failure_modes: Using incorrect fixity for the chosen operator (e.g., placing operator after operand when prefix position is required, or vice versa)
Substituting a different operation than the one intended (selecting a related but distinct function)
Not revealing hidden control panel before attempting to locate the control
verification_checklist: Expression displays the correct operator element
Result consistent with the intended operation semantics

categories.name: APPLY_COMPOUND_FORMULA
categories.precondition: Main input surface active; all required operators/operands known
abstract_steps: Plan full element sequence in advance
Use grouping markers around denominators or nested sub-expressions as needed to preserve intended structure of the formula
Enter elements strictly in left-to-right order
Close any opened grouping markers in matching nesting order to finalize the structure
Evaluate
failure_modes: Operator precedence errors caused by omitting appropriate grouping markers around sub-expressions
Forgetting to close an opened grouping marker before evaluation of the expression
Applying an exponent-like operator without grouping a composite exponent sub-expression, causing only part of it to be raised
verification_checklist: All grouping markers are balanced and correctly scoped to their intended sub-expressions within the formula
Result matches the expected correct answer
Expression visible in display matches planned sequence exactly

categories.name: REVEAL_HIDDEN_CONTROL
categories.precondition: A required control is not visible in default layout
abstract_steps: Identify a toggle that exposes additional controls
Activate the toggle
Locate and use the previously hidden control
Optionally return the panel to its compact state
failure_modes: Confusing an overflow/more-options menu with a feature-expansion toggle that swaps the displayed control set
Assuming control does not exist and declaring task infeasible
Getting stuck in sub-menu without ability to return
verification_checklist: Target control becomes visible and interactive

categories.name: RESET_INPUT
categories.precondition: Input surface contains unwanted or incorrect content
abstract_steps: Invoke the full-reset control that empties the entire input surface
Verify input surface is empty or at initial value
Begin fresh entry
failure_modes: Using partial-delete (removing a lone element) when a full reset was intended
Repeatedly performing a full reset without addressing the underlying conceptual error
Resetting after each element, preventing multi-element entry
verification_checklist: Subsequent actions build expression from scratch

categories.name: VERIFY_OUTPUT
abstract_steps: Read result field
Compare against expected value or symbolic form
Decide success or retry
failure_modes: Misinterpreting an auto-preview intermediate value as the final committed result
Stopping at an unexpected partial value and declaring completion prematurely without full evaluation
Not noticing mode or unit differences affecting interpretation
verification_checklist: Value matches expected within appropriate precision

categories.name: NAVIGATE_MENU
abstract_steps: Scan menu for relevant item
Select it or dismiss if irrelevant
Return to main workspace via back/dismiss action
failure_modes: Treating the menu as a source of unrelated features
Leaving a modal overlay open and blocking further input
verification_checklist: No lingering overlay or modal surface

categories.name: TOGGLE_STATE
categories.precondition: An entity exists with a toggleable state (e.g., active/inactive, on/off) and is visible or reachable
abstract_steps: Identify current state via visual indicators
Navigate to the control surface if not already there
Invoke the toggle control
Verify the state changed to the desired target
failure_modes: Declaring success without taking any action based on a misread of current state
Clicking a non-interactive label instead of the actual control
Toggling past the desired state (e.g., invoking the toggle on an already-target-state item flips it back to the opposite state)
verification_checklist: Target state's distinctive UI element is present (e.g., opposite action button shown)

categories.name: ACTIVATE_ENTITY
categories.precondition: Entity is in an inactive/idle state and can be transitioned to an active state
abstract_steps: Navigate to the entity's control screen
Locate the primary activation control
Click the activation control
Verify active-state controls appear (e.g., controls for suspending or terminating the active state)
failure_modes: Attempting activation on the wrong tab/section
Mistaking a display for a button

categories.name: ENTER_STRUCTURED_VALUE
categories.precondition: An input surface exists that accepts a multi-field structured value (e.g., H:M:S, date parts) via a keypad that shifts digits
abstract_steps: Navigate to the input surface
Understand the keypad semantics: determine whether digits fill from the right (shift-left) or whether fields are edited independently
If shift-fill: enter the full digit sequence in order from most-significant to least-significant, including leading zeros to place digits in correct fields
Avoid partial backspaces unless correcting the last digit only
Verify the displayed value matches the target exactly before confirming
failure_modes: Assuming each field is edited independently when keypad actually shifts digits across fields
Entering only significant digits and skipping leading zeros, causing digits to land in the wrong field
Using backspace repeatedly to 'clear' without realizing it only removes one digit at a time
Re-entering after partial clear and compounding misalignment
Declaring completion before verifying display matches target
verification_checklist: Displayed value exactly equals target across all sub-fields
Did not inadvertently trigger an activation/confirm control

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item visible in its containing view
abstract_steps: Long-press the item to enter selection mode
Trigger the deletion action from the action bar
Confirm the deletion in the confirmation dialog
failure_modes: Selecting the wrong item with a similar name
Dismissing the confirmation dialog instead of confirming
Attempting to perform the deletion from a summary/cleanup screen instead of the primary content browsing view
verification_checklist: Item no longer present in the containing view

categories.name: RELOCATE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target item visible; destination folder exists and is known
abstract_steps: Long-press the item to enter selection mode
Open the overflow/more-options menu
Choose the relocation action
In the destination picker, navigate to the exact destination folder (switching roots/volumes as needed)
Confirm the relocation from within the destination folder
failure_modes: Confirming the relocation while the picker is still at the default location
Choosing a duplication action or a metadata-viewing action by mistake
Not switching to the correct top-level volume in the picker

categories.name: QUERY_METADATA
abstract_steps: Select the item or open overflow menu
Choose the details/properties option
Read the displayed metadata
failure_modes: Confusing the details screen with an actionable screen
verification_checklist: Details page shows expected attributes (type, modified date, size/count)
